name: Shivam Kumar
summary: Software Engineer with 4+ years building enterprise web applications in Java, Spring Boot, and React, with production experience in authentication, RBAC, payment integrations, and real-time systems.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built and maintained Enterprise Service Management platforms using Java, Struts, and Spring Boot.
Implemented JWT-based authentication and role-based access control (RBAC) for multi-tenant modules.
Integrated Google Maps API for location-based features and BillDesk payment gateway for transaction processing.
Built SOAP integrations to connect with third-party enterprise systems.
Optimized dashboard queries and backend performance, reducing load times on high-traffic views.
Identified and remediated OWASP top-10 vulnerabilities across the platform.
Built a real-time chat feature and an engineer-tracking module using WebSockets/STOMP.
